GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $857.58 AWARDED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT WILLIAM CHILD, AGAINST PLAINTIFF PAVEL NIDERMAN; PLAINTIFF TO PAY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Defendant'S Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (with the sole modification of allowing 30 days for payment of sanctions instead of 15 days): As to DEFENDANT WILLIAM CHILD'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Defendant's Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions, the motion to compel discovery granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to serve responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One, within 15 days of notice of the court's order granting the motion to compel. Good cause appearing, sanctions in the amount of $857.58 awarded in favor of defendant William Child, against plaintiff Pavel Niderman; plaintiff to pay sanctions to defendant within 30 days of notice of the court's order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
